scope: completed P0/P1/P2 wave including isolated encryption-lifecycle and maintenance-operation analyses plus green commit-specific SQL Server 2019, 2022 and 2025 Actions gates including the SQL Server 2025 regex matrix

inMemoryOltpTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

temporalTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

temporalReadOnlyContract.note: The module reads visible catalogs and approximate partition statistics only; it does not claim overlap freedom, cleanup success or recognition of disconnected former pairs.

serviceBrokerTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

serviceBrokerReadOnlyContract.note: The module reads only visible configuration and aggregated operational metadata. Disabled RECEIVE is reported as review evidence and never as proof of a poison message.

fullTextTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

fullTextReadOnlyContract.note: The module reads only visible catalogs and aggregated current Full-Text runtime metadata. Empty DMVs are not treated as history, and thresholds do not trigger DDL.

dataCaptureTsqlParse.note: Static parser validation only; this is not SQL Server compilation or execution evidence.

dataCaptureReadOnlyContract.note: CT loss requires an explicit consumer watermark; scheduled CDC and remote Distributor limitations are preserved, and accessible source subsets remain valid.

encryptionReadOnlyContract.note: TDE, protector lifecycle, explicit backup encryption and aggregate Always Encrypted or Ledger metadata remain separate evidence classes; external key possession and restoreability are not claimed.

maintenanceReadOnlyContract.note: Job catalogs are not read without an explicit filter; duration, pause and PVS size remain contextual observations.

sqlServer2025RegexPredicateContract.note: SQL Server 2025 exposes REGEXP_LIKE as a predicate; comparisons to numeric 0 or 1 are rejected by the static documentation gate.

sqlServer2025PermissionErrorContract.note: SQL Server 2025 error 371 for missing VIEW SERVER PERFORMANCE STATE is classified as DENIED_PERMISSION; the static documentation gate rejects permission mappings that retain error 229 without 371.

repositoryPrivacyGate.note: The automated repository and ZIP gate applies only to repository and downloadable artifacts; runtime resultsets and OUTPUT values are unchanged. Findings report rule, path and count without echoing matched content, while ambiguous cases still require manual review and a stop-before-write decision.

testDocumentation.claim: Commit 08b2d9d8c7adbadbf0996058d6bbb35b08c96ad8 passed the synthetic Linux installer, 13-suite release gate and permission contract on SQL Server 2019, 2022 and 2025, including the separate SQL Server 2025 regex matrix. Exact public product builds and immutable container image digests were captured. This is not feature-positive, boundary, load, Windows, Azure MI or external restore evidence.

runtimeLimitations: Local Docker, sqlcmd and PowerShell were unavailable; the primary runtime evidence is the three green commit-specific GitHub Actions gates.
Feature-positive, boundary, load, Windows, Azure MI and external restore cases remain separate from the synthetic empty-database Actions contract.
